scripts.sit-headless: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=sit HEADLESS=true playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.sit-headed: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=sit HEADLESS=false playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.sit-headless-smoke: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=sit HEADLESS=true playwright test --project=chromium --grep '@smoke'
scripts.sit-headed-smoke: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=sit HEADLESS=false playwright test --project=chromium --grep '@smoke'
scripts.uat-headless: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=uat HEADLESS=true playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.uat-headed: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=uat HEADLESS=false playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.uat-headless-smoke: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=uat HEADLESS=true playwright test --project=chromium --grep '@smoke'
scripts.uat-headed-smoke: npx cross-env TEST_ENV=uat HEADLESS=false playwright test --project=chromium --grep '@smoke'
